text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower and I are doing a routine check on
the comfort of her signature racewear.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She seems somewhat distracted throughout.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While I'm a bit concerned, I focus my attention on
our training schedule for the next few days,
until...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I catch sight of Rice Shower outside the window.
Confused, I rush out of my office and chase after
her.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
"And then, the roses and all the visitors in the
garden..."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She's reading a picture book out loud to herself...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's a book she's shown me before. Her beloved The Blue Rose of Good Fortune
choice_data_list: What are you doing out so late?
What are you doing out so late?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Big Brother...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Big Sister...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I... can't stop thinking...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Is it really okay for me to wear those clothes... Do
I really deserve them?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Yes... The dress has a picture book motif, right?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
So I figured if I read this picture book just once
more... Maybe I'd stop having those thoughts.
choice_data_list: You don't have to bear this alone.
You don't have to bear this alone.

That shows how much you like your signature
racewear.

That shows how much you like your signature
racewear.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
So I figured if I read this picture book just once
more... Maybe I'd stop having those thoughts.
choice_data_list: You don't have to bear this alone.
You don't have to bear this alone.

That shows how much you like your signature
racewear.

That shows how much you like your signature
racewear.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Big Brother...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Big Sister...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... Um...
choice_data_list: What's wrong? You can tell me.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I... I don't want to lose.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I want to wear the clothes I made with you... and
win!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I want to wear the clothes I made with you... and
win!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
But I can only see myself losing. I hate those
thoughts, but they won't stop.
choice_data_list: Use those feelings when you race.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Use them when I race? H-how?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
How can I explain what I mean? Suddenly, the
picture book she's holding catches my eye.
choice_data_list: Sorry, can I borrow that for a second?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh? S-sure.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take the book and flip through the pages until I
find the passage I want to show her.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
"The blue rose began to wish it could bloom
beautifully for everyone..."

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
"And as that wish grew bigger, its petals
unfolded, one by one, revealing its beauty."

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I see... The rose used its feelings to grow.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Then... I'll carry these feelings in my heart as I run!
I won't lose!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Then... I'll carry these feelings in my heart as I run!
I won't lose!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It looks like she's feeling a bit more optimistic!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: After all, I only have this dream because of you.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: After all, I only have this dream because of you.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
We poured my dream—and my favorite
book—into those clothes.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: So I... I want to wear them... and I want to win!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Waaah... Hic... I don't—Hic...—want to lose...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
B-but... that's all I can think about... I hate it so
much!
choice_data_list:
Your racewear will respond to your feelings,
you know.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: It will? H-how?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looking around for a way to explain what I mean,
my eyes settle on the picture book she's holding.
choice_data_list: Sorry, can I borrow that for a second?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh? S-sure.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take the book and flip through the pages until I
find the passage I want to show her.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
"'Don't cry,' says Big Brother. 'Don't forget your
own heart,' he says gently."

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
"'Don't cry,' says Big Sister. 'Don't forget your
own heart,' she says gently."

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
"'As long as you hold onto your wish... for
everyone to be happy... your feelings will
certainly reach them.'"

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: "'Just like they reached me.' Big Brother smiles."

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: "'Just like they reached me.' Big Sister smiles."

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...My feelings will reach them.
choice_data_list: And they'll certainly reach your racewear too.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: You're right.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I'm going to... trust my heart.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I'm going to... trust my heart.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Rice Shower is feeling more
confident!
